scripts.dev: bun run infra && until docker exec rsias-postgres-1 pg_isready -U rsias_user -d rsias_db -p 5432; do echo 'Waiting for PostgreSQL...'; sleep 2; done && bun run migrate && bun x concurrently --kill-others -n "BFF,PROD,FUND,PERS,AI,FRONT" -c "cyan,magenta,red,yellow,green,blue" "bun run bff" "bun run producer" "bun run producer:fund" "bun run persistence" "bun run ai" "bun run frontend"
scripts.test:all: bun x concurrently "cd backend && go test ./..." "cd ai-worker && pytest" "cd frontend && bun test"
